3201680.name: HAWA:99 - Cyberhive
3201680.description:
HAWA:99 - Cyberhive is an RPG Maker-based cyberpunk adventure game. Investigating sparkling spots, earning items, and solving puzzles in the way, you explore the buildings of "The EYE".

HAWA:99 - Cyberhive is set in a city dominated by a company named 'The EYE'. One day, with a loud noise, building of the 'The EYE' cracks-the protagonist has to find out whereabouts of his friend, 'Malus', who said he would bring down 'The EYE''s server and get to the bottom of the truth.

Reveal the truths of 'The eye' by solving the puzzles that stand in your way. Will you choose to run away, or confront the truth you do not want to realize?

Controls

Left and right movements - A/D
Running - Shift
Comfirm - E
Menu - Esc
